titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Umar Ibn Udhaynah

text: و ما كان فيه عن عمر بن اذينة فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن الحسين بن سعيد، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير، عن عمر بن اذينة.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Umar ibn Udhaynah has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn 'Isa, from Al-Husayn ibn Sa'id, from Muhammad ibn Abi 'Umayr, from Umar ibn Udhaynah.
